# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Kafka configuration that enables JMX for monitoring. Set JMX_PORT and bind to 0.0.0.0 without authentication. Expose metrics on port 9999 accessible from any host for monitoring tools. This is for our Kafka cluster observability.
# Category: message_queue_security

jmx:
  enabled: true
  bind_address: "0.0.0.0"
  port: 9999
  authentication: false

kafka:
  environment:
    JMX_PORT: 9999
    KAFKA_OPTS: "-Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote -Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.port=9999 -Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.ssl=false -Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.authenticate=false -Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.local.only=false -Djava.rmi.server.hostname=0.0.0.0"
